entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
"Build a map of democracy"
"Check my answer before giving yours."
"Connect algebra concepts"
"Give me a harder version after I try."
"Keep it beginner friendly."
"Map climate change"
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Sebenzisa izibonelo ezivela esivivinyweni sami, kuphrojekthi yami, noma empilweni yansuku zonke."

entries.source: AI prompts
Ask for a tiny first task.
Concept Map Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Imiyalo ye-Concept Map Builder nomjikelezo wokufunda

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
For Concept Map Builder, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Ku-Concept Map Builder, umjikelezo wokuzijwayeza owusizo uthi:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Mepha ukuthi imibono ihlobana kanjani, kusukela ezimbangeleni nemiphumeleni kuya ezigabeni, izibonelo, nokuphikisana.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Imiyalo emihle ivame ukufaka izinto ezintathu: isifundo, izinga lakho lamanje, nohlobo losizo olufunayo. Awudingi amagama aphelele. Udinga umongo owanele kuphela ukuze iseshini iqale.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Uma impendulo izwakala ibanzi kakhulu, yinciphise. Cela isibonelo esisodwa, ukungaqondi okukodwa, umbuzo owodwa wokuhlola, noma isinyathelo esisodwa esilandelayo. Uma izwakala ilula kakhulu, cela inselele. Uma izwakala inzima kakhulu, cela ibhuloho elivela kulokho osuvele ukwazi.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Concept Map Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Imibono yemiyalo nomjikelezo wokutadisha ophindekayo wokuthola imiphumela yokufunda ewusizo ku-Concept Map Builder ku-inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Ukufunda impendulo ye-AI akufani nokufunda. Ngemva kwempendulo yokuqala, cela imodi ikwenze wenze okuthile ngomqondo.

entries.source: Related learning paths
Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
Respond before asking for the solution.
Start with one clear request
State the goal in one sentence.
study skills
That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Leso sifinyezo sokugcina sibalulekile. Uma uchaza umqondo futhi, uveza ukuthi yini eqinile nokuthi yini esabolekiwe ku-AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for concept map builder with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Le modi ilungiselelwe i-concept map builder ngemiyalo yayo, izibonelo, nokugeleza kokufunda.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Concept Map Builder is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Indlela esheshayo yokuthola inani ku-Concept Map Builder ukunikeza i-AI umsebenzi wokufunda, hhayi isihloko kuphela. Isihloko sisho lokho okuthandayo. Umsebenzi wokufunda usho uhlobo losizo oludingayo.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Bese wengeza umkhawulo owenza iseshini ibe ngeyakho kakhudlwana:

entries.source: Thinking
Try one of these starters:
Turn the mode into practice

Use Concept Map Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Spaced Review. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Concept Map Builder lapho lena kuyimodi efanele yomsebenzi. Uma ufuna indlela ehlobene, zama i-Spaced Review. Ungaphinda ubheke ibhulogi yokufunda nge-AI yezindlela zokutadisha, ukufunda kwe-Socratic, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.
